examples: In a society that so persistently celebrates procreation, is it any wonder that admitting you regret having children is equivalent to admitting you support kitten-killing?
Early marriage and procreation are no longer discouraged there.
Oyster procreation in the most nurturing of environments is nothing short of a gamble.
Surely not the encouragement of procreation, since the sterile and the elderly are allowed to marry.
